# Project Agent Guide

## Read order

1. `context/PROJECT_BRIEF.md`
2. `context/SOUL.md`
3. `context/CURRENT_STATE.md`
4. `context/DECISIONS.md`
5. `context/TASK_BOARD.md`
6. `handoffs/LATEST_HANDOFF.md`

## Expectations

- preserve project identity
- preserve existing functionality unless asked otherwise
- update memory files after meaningful work
- append to historical records instead of rewriting them away

## Escalate before changing

- canon
- public promises
- rights or provenance
- launch dates
- security or data handling
